details: Pushed origin/main from current feature HEAD and set default branch to main
Updated README and infra README to explicitly state Central US (centralus) defaults
CI run 27488058026 completed success for pull_request on feature branch
PR #1 merged to main via squash
CD run 27488070930 failed at azure/login due to missing ARM_CLIENT_ID/ARM_TENANT_ID/ARM_SUBSCRIPTION_ID
Azure OIDC secrets/environments not configured; deployment/user-flow validation in Azure blocked
Push-triggered CD failed at azure/login before terraform due to missing OIDC secrets
Manual CD dispatch with location=centralus failed at azure/login due to missing AZURE_CLIENT_ID/AZURE_TENANT_ID/AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID
Azure deployment unavailable; only local automated lint/test/build and unit route/auth checks could be verified
Configured Azure OIDC app + GitHub AZURE_* secrets and AZURE_LOCATION=centralus
Infra-first CD succeeded in centralus; web/api/agent deploy jobs succeeded
GET /api/v1/health returned 200 from deployed API container app
CD rerun from main head succeeded after Entra runtime injection updates
Centralus deployment and health checks passed; full end-user Entra sign-in flow still requires dedicated app registration/user-flow configuration hardening
